title: Lightning Beat Maple Leafs 4 2 for Sixth Straight Win
snippets: Lightning roll past Maple Leafs 4-2 for 6th straight win The Globe and Mail
Brayden Point, Nikita Kucherov, and Gage Goncalves each finished with three points while Andrei Vasilevskiy made 32 saves as the Tampa Bay Lightning defeated the Toronto Maple Leafs 4-2.
Mark Scheifele dished out two assists and Cole Perfetti buried the overtime winner as the Winnipeg Jets took down the Vancouver Canucks, winning 3-2.

Pavel Dorofeyev scored twice, Colton Sissons, Brandon Saad and Reilly Smith scored in a 4:14 span in the third, as the Vegas Golden Knights rallied past the Los Angeles Kings 6-4, spoiling Artemi Panarin’s two-assist debut.
Wyatt Johnston added two goals to his season tally, Thomas Harley dished out a pair of assists, and the Dallas Stars took care of the Seattle Kraken 4-1.

Tage Thompson and Peyton Krebs each finished with a goal and an assist while Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen gave up just one goal and made 27 saves to lead the Buffalo Sabres to a 2-1 win over the New Jersey Devils.

Parker Kelly kick-started a four-goal second period, with Victor Olofsson, Brock Nelson, and Martin Necas all finding the back of the net while Scott Wedgewood turned aside 28 shots as the Colorado Avalanche beat the Utah Mammoth 4-2.

Aliaksei Protas finished with a goal and an assist, Trevor van Riemsdyk and Rasmus Sandin each scored, and Logan Thompson made 23 saves to lead the Washington Capitals to a 3-1 win over the Philadelphia Flyers.

Cutter Gauthier scored the game-winner with 1:14 left, Leo Carlsson had a goal and two assists in his return from injury, Lukas Dostal made 22 saves, and the Anaheim Ducks rallied from two separate two-goal deficits to beat the Edmonton Oilers 6-5.

Nikita Kucherov scored to give him his ninth 30-goal season and added two assists for 701 in his career and the Tampa Bay Lightning defeated the Toronto Maple Leafs 4-2 on Wednesday night for their sixth straight victory.
